_comment_usage: Copy this file to 'appsettings.local.json' (gitignored) to override Iris Desktop runtime settings locally. Layered over appsettings.json at startup. All keys are optional.
_comment_database: Database:ConnectionString accepts either a full SQLite connection string with an absolute Data Source, OR a bare absolute file path which Iris will wrap as 'Data Source=<path>'. Relative paths (e.g. 'iris.db', './data/iris.db') are rejected at startup.
